Interface BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event<E extends SkriptEvent>

Type Parameters:
E - The class providing the implementation of the SkriptEvent this info represents.
All Superinterfaces:
DefaultSyntaxInfos, SyntaxInfo<E>
All Known Implementing Classes:
SkriptEventInfo.ModernSkriptEventInfo
Enclosing class:
BukkitSyntaxInfos
public static interface BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event<E extends SkriptEvent> extends SyntaxInfo<E>
A syntax info to be used for SkriptEvents. It contains additional details including the Bukkit events represented along with documentation data.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event.Builder<B extends BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event.Builder<B,E>, E extends SkriptEvent>
    An Event-specific builder is used for constructing a new Event syntax info.

  • Field Details

    • KEY

      static final SyntaxRegistry.Key<BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event<?>> KEY
      A SyntaxRegistry key representing the Bukkit-specific SkriptEvent syntax element.

  • Method Details

    • builder

      static <E extends SkriptEvent> BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event.Builder<? extends BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event.Builder<?,E>, E> builder(Class<E> eventClass, String name)
      Parameters:
      eventClass - The Structure class the info will represent.
      name - The name of the SkriptEvent.
      Returns:
      A Structure-specific builder for creating a syntax info representing type.

    • toBuilder

      @Contract("-> new") BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event.Builder<? extends BukkitSyntaxInfos.Event.Builder<?,E>, E> toBuilder()
      Specified by:
      toBuilder in interface SyntaxInfo<E extends SkriptEvent>
      Returns:
      A builder representing this SyntaxInfo.

    • listeningBehavior

      SkriptEvent.ListeningBehavior listeningBehavior()
      Returns:
      The listening behavior for the SkriptEvent. Determines when the event should trigger.

    • name

      String name()
      Returns:
      The name of the SkriptEvent.

    • id

      String id()
      Returns:
      A documentation-friendly version of name().

    • documentationId

      @Nullable @Nullable String documentationId()
      Returns:
      Documentation data. Used for identifying specific syntaxes in documentation.
      See Also:
      • DocumentationId

    • since

      SequencedCollection<String> since()
      Returns:
      Documentation data. Represents the versions of the plugin in which a syntax was added or modified.
      See Also:
      • Since

    • description

      SequencedCollection<String> description()
      Returns:
      Documentation data. A description of a syntax.
      See Also:
      • Description

    • examples

      Collection<String> examples()
      Returns:
      Documentation data. Examples for using a syntax.
      See Also:
      • Examples

    • keywords

      Collection<String> keywords()
      Returns:
      Documentation data. Keywords are used by the search engine to provide relevant results.
      See Also:
      • Keywords

    • requiredPlugins

      Collection<String> requiredPlugins()
      Returns:
      Documentation data. Plugins other than Skript that are required by a syntax.
      See Also:
      • RequiredPlugins

    • events

      Collection<Class<? extends org.bukkit.event.Event>> events()
      Returns:
      A collection of the classes representing the Bukkit events the SkriptEvent listens for.
